title: The Iran War Sent Shock Waves Through Asia That Are Likely to Spread
summary_full: The Asia-Pacific was hit hard and quick by the war in Iran and its energy bottlenecks. Scenes of crisis there indicate that problems are multiplying and spreading.
summary_public: The Asia-Pacific was hit hard and quick by the war in Iran and its energy bottlenecks. Scenes of crisis there indicate that problems are multiplying and spreading.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: The Iran War Sent Shock Waves Through Asia
